final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input en,
    output reg [1:0] count
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (reset)
            count <= 2'b0;  // Reset counter
        else if (en)
            count <= count + 1;  // Increment counter on enable
    end

endmodule
